message:
feat: add process name fallback for agent detection

When pane title doesn't match NTM format (e.g., due to shell prompts
or tmux hooks changing it dynamically), fall back to detecting the
agent type from the foreground process command.

Supported agents via command detection:
- claude, claude-code → Claude
- codex → Codex
- gemini → Gemini
- cursor → Cursor
- windsurf → Windsurf
- aider → Aider

Fixes #20.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
